news.title: Founders Fund nears $6 billion close for latest growth fund, sources say
news.summary: The firm is raising this growth fund less than a year after closing its previous $4.6 billion vehicle.

news.title: Electric air taxis are about to take flight in 26 states
news.summary: The federal government has selected eight proposals to test electric aircraft across 26 states.

news.title: OpenAI and Google employees rush to Anthropic’s defense in DOD lawsuit
news.summary: More than 30 OpenAI and Google DeepMind employees signed onto a statement supporting Anthropic's lawsuit against the Defense Department after the agency labeled the AI firm a supply-chain risk, according to court filings.

news.title: Anthropic launches code review tool to check flood of AI-generated code
news.summary: Anthropic launched Code Review in Claude Code, a multi-agent system that automatically analyzes AI-generated code, flags logic errors, and helps enterprise developers manage the growing volume of code produced with AI.

news.title: Bluesky CEO Jay Graber steps down
news.summary: Graber explained that, as a more mature company, Bluesky needs a "seasoned operator focused on scaling and execution." Graber said she feels better suited to building Bluesky's technology itself.

news.title: Apple smart home display rumors now point to a fall launch with iOS 27
news.summary: The rumored "HomePod with a screen" we've heard so much about was reportedly lined up for launch in 2025, and then this spring, and now, according to the latest updates, it's on the shelf until this fall. news.title: The government shutdown is hitting airports — but not ICE
news.summary: Chaos reigned at airports across the country last weekend, with thousands of travelers reportedly waiting in hours-long security lines thanks to staffing shortages. Transportation Security Administration (TSA) and Coast Guard workers have turned to food banks for assistance after weeks without pay.

news.title: Everything from the last week of everything is gambling now
news.summary: Kalshi is facing backlash from its own users after a class action lawsuit was filed last week alleging it failed to pay out as promised for wagers regarding when Iranian Supreme Leader Ayatollah ​Ali Khamenei would leave or be removed from office. news.title: ‘Flying Cars’ Will Take Off in American Skies This Summer
news.summary: The federal government announced a new pilot program designed to get new kinds of ultralight vehicles and “eVTOLs” up and running around the country—even if they're not fully FAA-certified.

news.title: Anthropic Claims Pentagon Feud Could Cost It Billions
news.summary: Executives at the AI startup say companies paused deal talks after the Trump administration labeled it a supply-chain risk, warning that the fallout could cause a major revenue hit.
